summary: Completed e2e testing of Items Bulk Excel Import feature. All backend API tests (9/9 passed) and frontend UI tests verified successfully.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue (existing from previous iterations)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ImportItem and TEST_MultiCategoryItem test data for API testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Items Bulk Excel Import feature fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) 'Import Excel' button in Items page header opens modal. 2) Modal contains: Import Instructions with 5 bullet points, Download Template button, File upload input, Start Import button (disabled until file selected), Cancel button. 3) Download Template returns Excel file with headers and sample data. 4) POST /api/items/import accepts Excel file, creates/updates items, handles comma-separated categories. 5) Backend uses pandas and openpyxl for Excel handling. 6) New items get company logo as default image. 7) Maximum 500 items per import enforced.

items_page_import_button.details: Import Excel button visible in Items page header with data-testid='import-items-btn'

import_modal_opens.details: Modal opens with title 'Bulk Import Items' when button clicked

modal_instructions.details: All 5 instruction bullet points visible: template download, comma-separated categories, auto-generated item code, manual image addition, 500 item limit

download_template_button.details: Download button with data-testid='download-template-btn' triggers Excel file download

file_upload_input.details: File input with data-testid='import-file-input' accepts .xlsx/.xls files

start_import_button.details: Start Import button with data-testid='start-import-btn' disabled until file selected

template_download_api.details: GET /api/items/import/template returns Excel file with correct headers and sample data

bulk_import_api.details: POST /api/items/import creates items with auto-generated codes, updates existing items by code match

multiple_categories_parsing.details: Comma-separated main categories and subcategories correctly parsed into arrays

api_tests.test_01_download_template_returns_excel: PASS - Template download returns valid Excel file
api_tests.test_05_import_valid_excel_file: PASS - Items created from valid Excel file
api_tests.test_06_import_updates_existing_items: PASS - Existing items updated by item_code match
